method: Three serial requests per B variant, fixed alternating order, same Dynamic-K/official-rerank/Flash/cold-cache contract.
decision: Do not enable the 1664 ceiling by default: it reduced estimated input units while increasing the three-run TTFT median. Keep aggregate tracing and the opt-in budget mechanism; require a new frozen A/B result before enabling any nonzero ceiling.
safety: Aggregate numeric trace only; no prompt, source, answer, provider payload, or credential is recorded.
